overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage exploring a medieval Gothic dormitory with stone walls, wooden vaulted ceilings, and four-poster beds. The camera slowly pans across the room showcasing detailed architecture and warm natural lighting before tilting up to examine the ceiling beams and hanging banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular Gothic dormitory with four-poster beds

agents.ego_description: slowly walking through the dormitory, observing the furniture and stone architecture at eye level

entered.detail: dark wood canopy bed with red curtains and white pillows
black cylindrical heating stove with chimney pipe extending upward
stack of vintage luggage chests on a wheeled cart
tall brass birdcage on pedestal with decorative elements
tall standing lamp with white fabric shade
arched stone windows with multiple panes letting in morning light
red and gold fabric pennants suspended from ceiling beams
ornate patterned rug covering wooden floor near stove

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a medieval dormitory with stone walls and wooden floors. The camera slowly pans right revealing four-poster beds with red curtains, a central cast iron stove, and stacked wooden trunks. Warm morning light streams through Gothic arched windows as the camera passes a brass birdcage and floor lamp, showcasing the detailed game environment.

events.description: camera tilts upward to examine the wooden ceiling beams and hanging banners
camera tilts back down to floor level to continue exploration

agents.ego_description: tilting head upward to inspect the vaulted ceiling architecture, then returning gaze to floor level

entered.detail: exposed timber beams arranged in radial pattern supporting conical roof
hanging iron light fixture with multiple lanterns suspended from ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal the impressive vaulted ceiling with heavy wooden beams and hanging fabric banners. After examining the ceiling architecture and iron chandelier, the view tilts back down to floor level, returning focus to the four-poster beds and brass birdcage as the exploration continues around the circular room.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that begins with a detailed exploration of a medieval dormitory's floor level before ascending to examine its vaulted architecture. It begins by panning right across stone walls and wooden floors, passing four-poster beds with red curtains, a central cast iron stove, and stacked wooden trunks under warm morning light. As the camera glides past a brass birdcage and floor lamp, the perspective shifts upward to reveal heavy wooden beams and hanging fabric banners draped across the ceiling. After lingering on the iron chandelier and the height of the vaulted structure, the view tilts back down to floor level, returning focus to the beds and birdcage as the camera continues its circular exploration of the room.
